engine.ladder_reasoning: A solo designer whose home nav is literally 'Work' and leads with a 21-tile portfolio grid — the work itself is the proof. Sells defined expertise too, but the portfolio is the spine of the decision, so work over trust.

goal.one_action: start a project inquiry (submit the contact form)

structure.archetype_note: Classic freelance-creative multipage: portfolio home + about + services + process + contact form. Contact offers 3 channels (email, Calendly, form) but the on-page form is primary.

mapped.observed_as: Brand design that transforms ambitious businesses into unforgettable brands.
Your brand has about three seconds to make an impression...
portfolio grid of 21 client project tiles
media/press logo strip (Dieline, Pentawards, Packaging of the World, WBDS)
Become unforgettable. / Let's get to work
Services (Logo Design, Brand Identity, Packaging, Strategy)
Commitment / Direct Access / Quality / Professionalism / Reliability

unmapped.observed: 'Ready to start?' fill-in-the-blank email template with prompted fields (project type, timeline, budget, shopping others)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A guided email-drafting scaffold that primes the visitor's outreach; not a form (no capture) and not standard cta copy

confidence.why: Content and structure are clear and coherent, but fetch_quality is 'rendered' not 'full' (design_hints empty, one page beyond crawl cap uncrawled), so capped at medium per rules.

gap_findings: Portfolio-as-proof has no dedicated canonical section id (sectionList lacks a 'portfolio'/'work-grid' section); mapped imperfectly to results.

Multi-channel contact intent (on-page form + mailto + single-step Calendly embed) — Calendly is a delegated scheduling handoff, not a proposed capability per the coltivar rule, but the coexistence of three parallel conversion channels isn't expressible as one mechanism.
Guided email-template scaffold (prompted fields for the visitor to draft their own inquiry email) is a distinctive lead-priming pattern with no section/capability fit.
